journal_entry.description: Receipt of security deposit from tenant
journal_entry.rationale: Cash increases (asset) from receipt of security deposit. The security deposit creates a liability because it must be returned to the tenant at the end of the lease term (subject to any damages). No revenue is recognized because the security deposit is not payment for rent.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Security deposit received creates an asset (cash) and a liability (obligation to return deposit). This is not rental revenue—it's a refundable deposit that will be returned at lease end unless applied to damages or unpaid rent.

output_credit_classifier.reason: Security deposit received creates an asset (cash) and a liability (obligation to return deposit). This is not rental revenue—it's a refundable deposit that will be returned at lease end unless applied to damages or unpaid rent.

output_entry_builder.description: Receipt of security deposit from tenant
output_entry_builder.rationale: Cash increases (asset) from receipt of security deposit. The security deposit creates a liability because it must be returned to the tenant at the end of the lease term (subject to any damages). No revenue is recognized because the security deposit is not payment for rent.
